content:
# Fuel Pass Pro: Real-Time Fuel Rationing System
## Problem Statement
Traditional fuel rationing systems in Bangladesh:
- Manual logging = human error
- No transparency
- Vulnerable to manipulation
## Solution: Fuel Pass Pro
A cloud-native digital ecosystem ensuring:
✓ Every drop of fuel is tracked
✓ Real-time quota management
✓ Zero double-dispensing
---
## System Architecture
### Three-Tier Design:
1. **User Authentication Layer** — Unique Vehicle IDs
2. **Cloud Synchronization** — Firebase Firestore
3. **Edge Verification** — Pump terminal validation
---
## How It Works
### User Flow:
1. Vehicle owner registers → Gets 60L quota
2. Generates dynamic QR code
3. Operator scans at pump
4. System validates quota
5. Fuel dispensed → Instant sync
---
## Technology Stack
| Component | Technology |
|-----------|-----------|
| Frontend | HTML5, CSS3 |
| Logic | JavaScript (ES6+) |
| Database | Firebase Real-time DB |
---
## Key Features
✓ Real-time Quota Tracking
✓ Multi-Portal Dashboard
✓ Secure Role-based Access
✓ Atomic Transactions
✓ Batch Quota Reset
✓ QR Code Verification
✓ Open Source
---
## Live Demo & Full Details
**🔗 Read complete technical breakdown:**
https://kazitravelblog.blogspot.com/2026/04/fuel-pass-pro-smart-rationing-system-kazi-humayun-rashid.html
**Live Demo:**
https://kazi1990.github.io/fuel-pass-rationing
**Published Case Study:**
https://zenodo.org/records/20733986
---
## Key Learnings
1. Serverless scales effortlessly
2. Real-time sync is crucial
3. Simple architecture wins
4. Cloud-native is the future
---
*Architected & Built by: Kazi Humayun Rashid*
*Lead System Architect | Google Cloud Innovator*
*Dhaka, Bangladesh*
